allow: PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/Branch-site/instructors" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "春名 present: $\($r.Content -match '春名'\)"; "多喜 present: $\($r.Content -match '多喜'\)"; "img present: $\($r.Content -match 'sibusawa.webp'\)" } catch { "ERROR: $_" })

PowerShell($ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4321/Branch-site/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "稼げる copy present: $\($r.Content -match '稼げる'\)" } catch { "ERROR: $_" })
